json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: File received from SFTP for processing
json-logger:logger.message: Customer master File received from SFTP for processing

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Incoming Payload
INFO: Customer Master file processed from SFTP
json-logger:logger.message: Customer Master file processed from SFTP

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { object: Mule::p('sfdc.customerMaster.object'), externalId: Mule::p('sfdc.customerMaster.externalId') }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: Mule::p('api.name'), apiVersion: Mule::p('api.version'), traceId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as DateTime, message: "Success", sfResponse: write(payload,"application/json") } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

json-logger:logger.doc:name: ERROR: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder
json-logger:logger.message: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload.allFailedJobs map ((item, index) -> { FFCCMPN: item.originalFields.Company_Number__c default "", FFCCUSN: item.originalFields.Customer_Number__c default "", //FFCARCD: item.originalFields.Active__c default "", FFCCNMB: item.originalFields.Name default "", FFCCA1B: if (item.originalFields.BillingStreet? and item.originalFields.BillingStreet != "") (item.originalFields.BillingStreet splitBy " ")[0] default "" else "", FFCCA2B: if (item.originalFields.BillingStreet? and item.originalFields.BillingStreet != "") (item.originalFields.BillingStreet splitBy " ")[1] default "" else "", FFCCTYB: item.originalFields.BillingCity default "", FFCSTEB: item.originalFields.BillingState default "", FFCZPCB: item.originalFields.BillingPostalCode default "", FFCBCEM: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Customer_Email__c default "", FFCBCWS: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Customer_Website__c default "", FFCBCAC: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Customer_a_r_Contact__c default "", FFCBAEM: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Customer_a_r_Email__c default "", FFCBCPA: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Customer_Purch_Agent__c default "", FFCBPEM: item.originalFields.Bill_To_Purch_Agent_Email__c default "", FFCPHNB: item.originalFields.Phone default "", FFCCDTE: if (item.originalFields.NCR_Created_Date__c?) (if (item.originalFields.NCR_Created_Date__c != null) (item.originalFields.NCR_Created_Date__c as String replace /-/ with "") else "") else "", FFCDTEM:if (item.originalFields.NCR_Last_Modified_Date__c?) (if (item.originalFields.NCR_Last_Modified_Date__c != null) (item.originalFields.NCR_Last_Modified_Date__c as String replace /-/ with "") else "") else "", FFCPHNF: item.originalFields.Fax default "", errorMessage: item.errorMessage })
